lines: No fixtures today, you idle bastards, so let's take stock of this dumpster fire of a sweepstake while the tournament takes a breather.

Ellis — yes, Ellis — is sitting pretty watching Argentina scrape past Egypt 3–2, and frankly that fuck is punching above her weight at 8th place, but Argentina are still breathing so don't write her off yet.

Meanwhile Carter and The Foreman can eat a collective bag of dicks after Colombia got battered out on penalties by fucking SWITZERLAND — 4–3 on pens, the absolute shambles — Carter drops to 4th, The Foreman is rotting in 9th with France as his only surviving team, one solitary fucking nation keeping him off the bottom.

Wilmot, you magnificent thick cunt — sitting joint 2nd on 75pts but let's be absolutely clear: England are your only hope because Morocco and Norway are keeping you afloat on borrowed fucking time, and if those fall over you'll be watching Butters — who has THREE teams still in — absolutely piss all over you from a great height while you cry into your Saudi Arabia memorial scarf.
Nothing on today, so enjoy the silence while it lasts — tomorrow the carnage resumes and someone's tournament is going in the fucking bin.
